hero.description: The complete Arabic dictionary for learners and native speakers — deep explanations, noun classes, cultural insights, and audio in every word.
hero.subtext: Free · No account required · iOS coming soon

words.exampleTranslation: My heart is full of love
I read a book every week

wotd.label: Word of the Day
wotd.exampleTranslation: Patience is the key to relief
wotd.note: The root ص-ب-ر appears in the Quran 90 times, reflecting the deep cultural weight of patience in Arabic tradition.

features.sectionDesc: ArabLingo bridges the gap between basic tools and true linguistic mastery.

save.title: Save & History
save.desc: Bookmark favourite words and revisit your full search history to reinforce learning at your own pace.

discover.title: Discover Vocabulary
discover.desc: Explore trending words and curated topic collections — from food to feelings, travel to tradition.

growth.title: Continuous Growth
growth.desc: 500+ essential words, cultural insights, and phrases updated regularly so your Arabic never stops growing.

deepDive.title: Everything You Need
deepDive.desc: Four pillars that make ArabLingo the most complete Arabic learning tool available.

dictionary.title: Dictionary Lookup
dictionary.desc: Comprehensive definitions with meanings in English and Vietnamese, Arabic phonetic transcriptions, root etymology, and noun class tagging. Every word in full context.

conversation.title: Conversation Mode
conversation.desc: Interactive dialogue practice with realistic scenarios. Pick your role — student, traveller, professional — and practise natural exchanges with instant feedback.

phrasebook.title: Phrasebook
phrasebook.desc: Practical phrases organised by context: greetings, restaurants, shopping, emergencies, and travel. Ready to use, immediately useful.

culture.title: Culture Guide
culture.desc: Go beyond the language. Learn cultural norms, etiquette, food traditions, and social practices for Arabic-speaking regions around the world.

testimonials.title: Loved by learners everywhere
testimonials.subtitle: From first-time learners to professional translators.

items.name: Fatima Al-Rashid
items.text: ArabLingo captures the nuance that other dictionaries miss. My students finally understand why a word feels the way it does — not just what it means.

items.name: Marcus Chen
items.text: The animated search and cultural notes are game-changers. I've tried five Arabic apps — this is the only one that makes me feel the language.

items.name: Leila Bouaziz
items.text: Finally an app that shows root connections and noun class. The phrasebook saves me hours when working with clients from different regions.

cta.title: Ready to dive into Arabic?
cta.desc: Join thousands of learners and native speakers discovering the true depth of the Arabic language.
cta.subtext: Free forever. No credit card required.
